# Dynatrace Skills

> Source: https://github.com/Dynatrace/dynatrace-for-ai
> Format: Agent Skills (https://agentskills.io)

## What is Dynatrace

Dynatrace is an observability and security platform that provides full-stack
monitoring including application performance, infrastructure, logs, digital
experience, and AI-powered root cause analysis (Davis AI). It uses a unified
data lakehouse (Grail) queried with DQL (Dynatrace Query Language).

## What this repository provides

This repository contains agent skills — portable knowledge packages that teach
AI coding agents how to work with Dynatrace. Skills provide domain-specific
instructions, DQL query patterns, and best practices.

For API tool access (live queries, entity lookups, problem retrieval), use the
Dynatrace MCP server (separate repository).

## Available skills

DQL & Query Language:
- dt-dql-essentials: DQL syntax rules, pitfalls, patterns. Required before writing DQL.

Observability:
- dt-obs-services: Service RED metrics, runtime telemetry (.NET, Java, Node.js, Python, PHP, Go).
- dt-obs-frontends: RUM, Web Vitals, user sessions, mobile, frontend errors.
- dt-obs-tracing: Distributed traces, spans, dependencies, failure detection.
- dt-obs-hosts: Host/process CPU, memory, disk, network, containers.
- dt-obs-kubernetes: K8s clusters, pods, nodes, workloads, labels.
- dt-obs-aws: AWS EC2, RDS, Lambda, ECS/EKS, VPC, cost optimization.
- dt-obs-logs: Log queries, filtering, pattern analysis, correlation.
- dt-obs-problems: Problem entities, root cause, impact assessment.
- dt-obs-extensions: Extension status and troubleshooting.

Dynatrace Apps:
- dt-app-dashboards: Dashboard JSON, tiles, layouts, DQL queries, variables.
- dt-app-notebooks: Notebook JSON, sections, analytics workflows.

Migration:
- dt-migration: Migrate classic entities to Smartscape.

Platform Operations:
- dt-platform: Billing analytics, audit trail, query analytics, workflow automation, GenAI usage via dt.system.events.

## Installation

Claude Code:  claude plugin marketplace add dynatrace/dynatrace-for-ai
Skills.sh:    npx skills add dynatrace/dynatrace-for-ai
Manual:       Copy skill directories into .agents/skills/

## Skill format

Each skill is a directory with a SKILL.md file (YAML frontmatter + markdown).
Skills use progressive disclosure: name+description loaded at startup (~100
tokens), full instructions loaded on activation (<5000 tokens), reference
files loaded on demand.

## Naming convention

All skills use the pattern dt-<domain>[-<usecase>] with kebab-case.
Domains: obs, appsec, biz, setup, migration, dql, sdlc, platform, fleet
